landing.heroSubtitle: Every signal locks just three numbers — entry, stop, target. One tap to your own MT5. The market scores the outcome, and no one can fudge it.
landing.heroNote: No credit card. Funds stay in your own broker account. Demo accounts welcome
landing.stat1: Custody of your funds: they never leave your broker account
landing.stat2: The engine watches the market around the clock so you don't have to
landing.stat3: Every signal scored on record, rules published in full
landing.statFootnote: Official partner broker MakeCapital. Live and demo MT5 accounts supported
landing.cmpSubtitle: Everything this industry hides, we turned into product features.
landing.cmpBad1: Post winning screenshots only. Losing calls quietly disappear.
landing.cmpGood1: The market scores every signal automatically. Full record kept: we never built a delete button.
landing.cmpBad2: Calls are just a direction: "Gold is going up, get in!"
landing.cmpGood2: Every signal ships with entry, stop, target and risk-reward: a complete, executable plan.
landing.cmpBad3: The win rate is whatever they claim. No way to verify it.
landing.cmpGood3: Scoring rules are published and hard-coded: TP first is a win, SL first is a loss, ambiguous cases count against us.
landing.cmpBad4: They want your deposit, then want you to follow "the master".
landing.cmpGood4: Zero custody. Your money sits in your own broker account. We couldn't touch it if we tried.
landing.cmpBad5: When the reputation burns, they disband and relaunch under a new name.
landing.cmpGood5: Our brand is chained to an unbroken daily public record. One missing day counts as a loss for us.
landing.cmpNote: This is not aimed at any specific service. It's the state of the industry, and it's why we built this product.
landing.shTitle: What you'll see after you sign in
landing.shSubtitle: Keep scrolling: the screen walks you through the full flow, from receiving a signal to reviewing the record.
landing.sh1Pain: "Entries on gut feel, exits on mood, stops on luck."
landing.sh1Title: Every signal is a complete trading plan
landing.sh1Desc: Not "gold is going up", but a full executable plan: entry, stop, target and risk-reward. The multi-timeframe engine runs around the clock, and every signal carries an expiry countdown. Expired means expired: no hindsight calls.
landing.sh2Pain: "Right direction, but hesitation cost the entry. Can't cut losers, can't hold winners."
landing.sh2Title: One click to execute. Fear never gets a vote
landing.sh2Desc: Slide to confirm and the order lands in your own MT5 with stop and target already locked in at fill time. After that, no willpower required. You were never short on judgment: just on a hand that doesn't shake.
landing.sh3Pain: "Day job, can't watch charts. Wake up and the profit turned into a loss."
landing.sh3Title: Auto position management: it stands guard while you sleep
landing.sh3Desc: Once profit reaches target distance, the stop moves itself to break-even. Trailing stops follow the market, partial take-profit banks on schedule (PRO). Faster and steadier than moving stops by hand, with zero emotion.
landing.sh4Pain: "Other services only show you the winners."
landing.sh4Title: Wins and losses, all on the record
landing.sh4Desc: Every signal's final verdict is public. Losses render in the same font size as wins. Audit us on a free account for as long as you like: if the record holds up, then we can talk.
landing.scrTrailOn: Trailing stop active. Partial take-profit armed. Rules are measured in R (initial risk) and only ever move in your favor.
landing.exTitle: Engineered for the worst case, even where you can't see it
landing.ex1Title: Position size from risk %, steady even for beginners
landing.ex1Desc: Tell it what percent of the account you're willing to risk and it sizes the lot from the stop distance. "Risk 1% per trade" goes from slogan to default setting.
landing.ex2Desc: Connection dropped? PC off? Any order unexecuted after 5 minutes voids itself. Nothing ever fills at a stale price behind your back.
landing.ex3Desc: Order status, fill price and position P&L stream back in real time. Every trade is reviewable and reconcilable, tracked like a parcel.
landing.wrTitle: The market scores our win rate. We don't
landing.wrSubtitle: After every signal fires, the system tracks the market and scores it by one published rulebook. No human filtering, no "that one doesn't count".
landing.wrRule1: Price hits take-profit first → scored as a WIN
landing.wrRule1Note: Based on actual market prices touched, independent of anyone's trading.
landing.wrRule2: Price hits stop-loss first → scored as a LOSS
landing.wrRule2Note: A loss is a loss. The record is permanent: nothing deleted, nothing hidden.
landing.wrRule3: Both touched inside one candle → conservatively scored as a LOSS
landing.wrRule3Note: When the order of events can't be known, we'd rather make our number look worse than guess in our own favor.
landing.wrRule4: Signals with a market-data outage → excluded from stats
landing.wrRule4Note: Neither a win nor a loss, so bad data never pollutes the win rate.
landing.wrNote: Register to see the live signal win rate plus your own real trading performance: two separate ledgers, neither one polished.
landing.prTitle: Audit us for free, or unlock full firepower
landing.prSubtitle: FREE is not a trial. It's permanent, and it exists so you can verify our record costs you nothing.
landing.prFreeF1: Delayed signals: visible after expiry, with the final verdict attached
landing.prFreeF2: Platform-wide public win rate and the full scoring rulebook
landing.prProF1: Real-time signals: FREE users see them about 10 minutes too late
landing.prProF2: One-click orders to your own MT5, slide to confirm
landing.prProF3: Automatic position sizing from risk percentage
landing.prProF4: Auto position management: break-even, trailing stop, partial take-profit
landing.prProF5: Your personal real win rate: see how you actually trade
landing.prNote: Both tiers exist permanently: upgrade or downgrade anytime. Upgrading happens on the in-app Upgrade page (USDT supported).
landing.prSponsor: Or let the partner broker cover it: open a MakeCapital account and keep it active, and PRO is sponsored. Details coming soon.
landing.howTitle: Three steps from signup to your first trade
landing.howSubtitle: About 5 minutes end to end. No coding required
landing.step1Desc: Register free and instantly see the signal panel, the history and the published scoring rules.
landing.step2Desc: Download the connector, paste your token, and your MT5 comes online. No account? Minutes to open, demo works too.
landing.step3Desc: Pick a signal, confirm the lot size, and the order lands in your MT5 with stop and target attached.
landing.faq1q: Is my money safe? Do you ever touch my funds?
landing.faq1a: No, and we couldn't. Your funds stay in an account opened in your own name at the partner broker; PRISMX never handles them. Our connector does exactly one thing: it sends the orders you have confirmed to the MT5 terminal running on your own machine. You can disconnect or reset your token at any time.
landing.faq2q: Is this an automated trading bot (EA)? Could it trade behind my back?
landing.faq2a: No. PRISMX makes no decisions for you: every single order requires your explicit confirmation before it is sent. What it solves is everything after the confirmation: position sizing, stop and target placement, execution speed and receipts.
landing.faq3q: Is the win rate real? What stops you from faking it?
landing.faq3a: No human touches the scoring. After a signal fires the system tracks the market: take-profit first is a win, stop-loss first is a loss, both-touched-in-one-candle counts against us, and data outages are excluded. Everyone sees the same number on the panel, and we can't edit it either.
landing.faq4q: I'm a complete beginner. Can I use this?
landing.faq4a: Yes. Beginners arguably benefit the most. You don't need to read charts or indicators: every signal carries a complete plan, and you can size positions simply as "the percent of my account I'm willing to risk". We recommend starting on a demo account.
landing.faq5q: What do I need to get connected?
landing.faq5a: Three things: 1) an MT5 account at the partner broker MakeCapital (live or demo, takes minutes to open); 2) a Windows PC running MT5 that stays on and online; 3) a PRISMX account. Your phone can watch signals and send orders from anywhere; execution happens on that PC's MT5.
landing.faq6a: We focus on gold (XAUUSD), major currency pairs, and popular instruments like BTC. Deliberately not "everything": going deep on a few instruments across timeframes beats spreading thin across a hundred.
landing.faq7q: Does it cost anything right now?
landing.faq7a: FREE is free forever (delayed signals plus the public record, built for auditing us). PRO is a subscription: see the pricing section on this page for current prices, yearly is better value, USDT accepted. Any price changes are announced in advance.
landing.faq8q: Will following the signals make me money?
landing.faq8a: Nobody can promise that, and anyone who does is lying to you. Trading always carries risk and past win rates never guarantee future results. What PRISMX provides is discipline and transparency: complete plans, locked-in stops, honest records. The decisions, and the risk, stay yours.
landing.faq9q: What's actually different between FREE and PRO?
landing.faq9a: One word: timing. FREE shows signals only after they expire (about a 10-minute delay), which makes it perfect for auditing the record and learning the plan structure, but structurally impossible to trade on. PRO is real-time delivery plus one-click execution, auto position management and your personal real win rate. FREE exists so you can audit us for free; upgrade only once the record has earned it.
landing.ctaTitle: Enter your next trade with a plan
landing.ctaSubtitle: Registration is free and a demo account covers the full flow. Audit our record on FREE first; upgrade only if we've earned it.
landing.ctaNote: No credit card. Signup takes 30 seconds
landing.demoPrevText: EURUSD SELL → stop-loss hit, scored as a LOSS. Kept on record, never deleted.
landing.expEyebrow: What Signal Groups Won't Tell You
landing.expTitle: Every card that burns is a lie the industry tells
landing.expSubtitle: These tricks work — so we built a no-lie version of each one. Same effect, zero fraud.
landing.expDark1: Post only winning screenshots. Losing calls quietly disappear.
landing.expDark2: Calls are just a direction: "Gold is going up!" No stop-loss.
landing.expDark3: Win rate is whatever they claim. No way to verify.
landing.expDark4: They want your deposit, then you follow "the master."
landing.expDark5: When reputation burns, disband and relaunch under a new name.
landing.expDark6: Never teach the principles — so you can never leave them.
landing.expMirror1: The market scores every signal automatically. We never built a delete button — you can't delete, even if you wanted to.
landing.expMirror2: Every signal ships with entry, stop, target and risk-reward: a complete, executable plan.
landing.expMirror3: Scoring rules are published and hard-coded: TP first is a win, SL first is a loss, ambiguous cases count against us.
landing.expMirror4: Zero custody. Your money sits in your own broker account. We couldn't touch it if we tried.
landing.expMirror5: Our brand is chained to an unbroken daily public record. One missing day counts as a loss for us.
landing.expMirror6: We openly teach risk management principles (that builds trust), but never the signal logic (that's the moat). You'll learn discipline; you'll still need the execution system.
landing.expMirror7: Real caps, real deadlines. When the clock runs out, the price goes up. The first time we prove we mean it, you'll believe every limit we set after that.
landing.expNote: This isn't aimed at any specific service. It's the state of the industry — and the reason we built this product.
landing.plTitle: From generation to verdict: every signal travels this tunnel
landing.plFootnote: At the end of the pipe, a crystal ledger. Wins and losses engraved side by side, same font size.
landing.deTitle: Three pillars lock your stop-loss. Your only job is to execute the plan.
landing.deSubtitle: At open: stop is locked. At profit target: auto break-even. As it runs: trailing stop follows. You sleep, it guards.
landing.tdTitle: Pick the tier that fits you
landing.tdDoorADesc: $49/month unlocks all real-time signals and execution
landing.tdDoorBDesc: Deposit $500+ and keep trading. PRO is sponsored by the broker — your money stays in your own account.
landing.tdFootnote: Door A: money spent. Door B: money still there. Both doors lead to PRO — we just got the broker to cover your tab.
landing.plStep1Desc: Our engine produces signals with five key elements: instrument, direction, entry, stop-loss, and take-profit. Each signal is a complete, executable plan.
landing.plStep2Desc: Review the signal in your PRISMX panel, then send it to your own broker's MT5 with one click. Your funds stay in your account — we never touch them.
landing.plStep3Desc: The market scores every trade. TP first = win, SL first = loss, edge cases count against us. Every result is engraved in the public ledger — no delete button exists.
landing.dc1: The moment you open, the stop is written and locked. You can't override it — that is discipline.
landing.dc2: When floating profit hits the threshold, stop moves to break-even. From that moment on, this trade can never lose.
landing.dc3: As profit runs, stop trails the market automatically. You don't need to watch the screen — sleep is safe.
landing.footerRisk: Risk warning: trading forex, precious metals and crypto assets carries a high level of risk and may result in the loss of your capital. Past signal performance does not guarantee future results. PRISMX provides technical signals and execution tooling only and does not constitute investment advice; whether and how to trade remains entirely your decision.

order.riskNeedsSl: Set a stop loss to size by risk %
order.riskUnsupportedPair: Risk-based sizing isn't supported for this pair yet — enter the volume manually
order.slWrongSide: Stop loss is on the wrong side of the current price
order.tpWrongSide: Take profit is on the wrong side of the current price
order.signalExpiredInModal: This signal just expired and can no longer be traded
order.slTpInvalid: Fix the stop loss / take profit before confirming
order.riskNote: Live prices may differ slightly from entry due to network latency. Execution is subject to your MT5 broker. Please double-check volume and side.
order.ackTimeout: No receipt yet, check the Orders page for the latest status
order.timeoutNote: If the command is not executed within 5 minutes (e.g. the Bridge is offline), it is cancelled automatically and will never fill later at a stale price. This platform provides signal tooling only, not investment advice. Trade at your own risk.
order.eaOffline: No MT5 connection online, cannot place order
order.noBridge: No MT5 connected yet. Open the PRISMX Bridge app, paste your token and start it, then place the order.
order.allOffline: All connected MT5 accounts are currently offline. Make sure the PRISMX Bridge app is running and MT5 is logged in, then retry.

account.title: Account
account.pwTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
account.notifUpgradeRequired: Push notifications aren't included in the free tier — upgrade to unlock
account.notifNoCategories: No indicator categories yet, run the signal engine first
account.notifPermissionDenied: Notification permission denied; enable in browser settings
account.notifBlocked: Notifications blocked by browser; enable in browser settings
account.autoHint: Rules are set in R units (R = the stop distance at open). E.g. move the stop to entry once the trade is up 1R. Applies only to positions opened through PRISMX — manual trades are never touched; positions opened without a stop have no defined R and are skipped. Every automated command shows up on the Orders page, fully traceable.
account.autoUpgradeRequired: Auto position management is a PRO feature — upgrade to unlock
account.autoScopeNote: The stop only ever moves in your favor — risk is never widened. Commands execute on your MT5 via the bridge; nothing happens while the bridge is offline.
account.notifUnsupported: Push notifications are not available in this browsing mode. On iPhone/iPad, tap Share in Safari and choose "Add to Home Screen", then open the site from that icon and enable notifications (requires iOS 16.4+).
account.notifDeviceHint: Notifications are enabled for your account, but this device has not been authorized yet. Toggle the switch off and on once to authorize this device.

charts.title: Charts
charts.subtitle: Live candlestick view; symbol follows your positions and signals
charts.disclaimer: Chart data comes from the platform's own feed and is for reference only; it may differ slightly from your broker's quotes.
charts.empty: Chart data is loading or temporarily unavailable…
charts.utcHint: The time axis and all timestamps are shown in UTC+8 (Malaysia/Singapore/China Standard Time)

draw.hint: Pick a tool and drag on the chart to draw; in cursor mode you can select, move or delete existing drawings. Drawings are saved per symbol and synced across devices.

winrate.strategyHint: Based on whether price hit take-profit or stop-loss first — the same for everyone, independent of anyone's trading behavior.
winrate.personalHint: Based on your own real closed trades.
winrate.disclaimer: Past performance does not guarantee future results.
winrate.closedTradesHint: Every real fill — the raw records the win rate above is built from.

orders.positionsScopeHint: Only shows positions opened via PRISMX orders; positions you open manually in the MT5 client never appear here and are never affected by actions here.
orders.historyHint: Every order, close, modify and cancel command with its execution status and receipt.

positions.closeSent: Close command sent, waiting for receipt…
positions.modifySent: Modify command sent, waiting for receipt…
positions.closeAllConfirm: Close all {{volume}} lots of {{symbol}}? This cannot be undone.

bind.title: Connect MT5
bind.subtitle: Run the PRISMX Bridge app and paste your token to connect your MT5 accounts
bind.accountsHint: Accounts reported by the PRISMX Bridge app. Multiple MT5 terminals show up here.
bind.accountQuotaReached: You've reached your plan's account limit. Upgrade to connect more MT5 accounts.
bind.brokerOnly: Only {{name}} MT5 accounts can connect (live and demo alike); accounts from other brokers are not accepted.
bind.deleteNeedOffline: Disconnect the bridge (account offline) before deleting
bind.deleteConfirm: Remove account {{login}} from your list? It will reappear if the bridge reports it again.
bind.tokenHint: This token is like a password. Keep it safe. Paste it into the PRISMX Bridge app to connect.
bind.tokenHidden: For security the token is stored encrypted and shown only once at generation. Click "Reset Token" to generate and view a new one (the old token stops working).
bind.tokenNeverGenerated: You haven't generated a token yet. Click below to create your token for connecting PRISMX Bridge.
bind.tokenJustOnce: Copy and store it now — it cannot be viewed again after you refresh or leave this page.
bind.resetConfirm: Resetting invalidates the old token immediately. Any running Bridge app must be updated with the new token, or it will fail to connect. Reset?
bind.suffixHint: If your broker's symbols carry a suffix (e.g. the .sc in GBPUSD.sc), enter it here. It will be appended to the symbol when placing orders. Leave empty for none.
bind.suffixNeedAccount: The suffix is saved per account. Run the Bridge app so an account is reported first.
bind.suffixPerAccountHint: Edit the suffix directly in each account's row above.

download.title: Download PRISMX Bridge
download.subtitle: The local app that links your MT5 terminals to PRISMX Signal Lab
download.whatDesc: PRISMX Bridge is a small app that runs on your computer. It automatically scans the MT5 terminals you're logged into, securely connects to the backend with your API token, reports accounts and positions to the web app, and executes the orders you send from the signal panel. Every trade runs on your own MT5.
download.g1Desc: Click the button above to download the installer and run it. If Windows shows "Windows protected your PC", click "More info → Run anyway".
download.g2Desc: Go to the Connect MT5 page and copy your API token. Treat it like a password and never share it.
download.g3Desc: Make sure MT5 is open and logged into your trading account on the same computer running the bridge. Multiple terminals can be logged in at once.
download.g4Desc: Open the bridge, paste your token, and click Connect. Once the status turns online, you can place orders from the signal panel.
download.n1: Clicking the window's close button minimizes it to the system tray and keeps it running in the background. To fully quit, right-click the tray icon and choose "Exit" — that's when it stops receiving and executing trades.
download.n2: Run the bridge on the same computer where MT5 is logged in.
download.n3: Enable "Allow algorithmic trading" in MT5, otherwise orders will be rejected by the terminal.
download.n4: Your API token is like a password. Never share it; if you suspect a leak, reset it anytime on the Connect MT5 page.
download.n5: Windows only; macOS is not supported yet.
download.sourceDesc: The installer is hosted on GitHub Releases, where you can review release notes and file checksums.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: User roles, subscription plans and basic operating metrics
admin.notePlaceholder: Internal note (not shown to the user)
admin.brokerPatternsHint: An MT5 account passes if its server name contains any keyword (case-insensitive; live and demo alike). E.g. "MakeCapital" matches both MakeCapital-Live and MakeCapital-Demo.
admin.saleBadgeHint: Big text on the pricing page, e.g. "SUMMER" or "LAUNCH"
